evals.expected_output: Should classify as Standard tier (single stack, 5-20 files, has order-of-operations). Should propose scoped edit permissions for files mentioned in the plan. Should select a domain-appropriate expert + an architectural skeptic. Should flag that test baselines need recording. Should produce a plan addendum and permission set.

Should classify as Standard tier (single stack, 5-20 files, has order-of-operations and risks section). Should propose edit permissions for database/schema-related files. Should select a database domain expert + a skeptic. Should flag risks around schema migration side effects. Should flag that test baselines need recording.

Should classify as Heavy tier (cross-stack, >20 files, multiple streams, involves deleting significant code). Should propose broad glob permissions for the streams. Should select 3-4 personas including domain expert and skeptic. Should flag test breakage risk from significant deletions. Should produce comprehensive test impact analysis.
